checks.description: A field-mapping instance must identify the element type it conforms to.
checks.label: Has element type ID

checks.description: A field-mapping instance must have a stable element instance identifier.
checks.label: Has instance ID

checks.description:
A field-mapping instance must identify the source-system field, path, column,
key, property, or local data shape being mapped.
checks.label: Has source field

checks.description:
A field-mapping instance must identify the Accountable Record field role or
structural role the source field satisfies.
checks.label: Has target field role
